revision_scope: substantial: 6 proof-gap sorries in legacy top-level stack (Control, Controllability, Invariance, LocalWellPosedness, Operators); SIARCRelay11/ trusted core is 0-sorry as claimed; 2 axiom-body sorries are intentional placeholders; 2 StateSpace fields are typeclass instance gaps fixable from Mathlib
recommended_next_venue: either (a) resubmit JAR after excising the legacy lean4/*.lean stack from the build target so the audit-correct count is 0 (cover letter clarifying the Relay-24 opaque/axiom conversion), or (b) Logical Methods in Computer Science (LMCS) which has higher tolerance for explicitly-labeled axiom boundaries; Mathematics in Computer Science (MCS) is fallback
disclosure_notes: manuscript.tex declares Untrusted Infrastructure 8 sorry (Operators 6, Control 1, LocalWellPosedness 1) but the SIARCRelay11/ infrastructure files were converted to opaque/axiom (0 sorry per TrustedBoundary.lean L251); the 10 real sorries actually live in the LEGACY top-level lean4/*.lean files: Axioms 2, Control 1, Controllability 1, Invariance 1, LocalWellPosedness 1, Operators 2, StateSpace 2 -- four of these files (Axioms, Controllability, Invariance, StateSpace) are NOT mentioned in the manuscript inventory
